PCB GLOBE is a premier cloud-native PCB manufacturing and assembly platform based in India. We specialize in rapid prototyping and high-volume production with a focus on precision, speed, and industrial-grade quality.
Yes! Our engineering team provides complimentary DFM (Design for Manufacturability) checks for all orders to ensure your boards are optimized for high-yield production.
PCB GLOBE

Empowering innovators with cloud-native PCB manufacturing. From rapid prototyping to high-yield industrial production.
